pr.title: Record: Mixed Quant Int6/FP16 + SmearGate + OrthoInit + MLP 3x + Sliding Window, val_bpb=1.1556

output.summary: SmearGate bigram gating plus hash embeddings fuel a 9-layer 512d transformer with 3× MLP, orthogonal init, Muon WD, and int6 STE QAT before sliding-window eval.
techniques: SmearGate bigram gate + hash embeddings enrich input space
Int6 STE QAT with fp16 embedding passthrough to prep for compression
Muon optimizer + orthogonal init underpin wider 3× MLP transformer
